color.name: color.brand.hue
color.usage: Use as the base hue for accent, links, badges, focus rings, and active controls.

color.name: color.brand.primary
color.usage: Use for active indicators, icon strokes, selected pagination, and primary links.

color.name: color.brand.primary.dark
color.usage: Use for active controls and links in dark mode.

color.name: color.surface.page
color.usage: Use for the main page canvas behind cards and panels.

color.name: color.surface.page.dark
color.usage: Use for dark mode canvas.

color.name: color.surface.card
color.usage: Use for primary content cards, navigation bars, widgets, and panels.

color.name: color.surface.card.dark
color.usage: Use for content cards and panels in dark mode.

color.name: color.surface.control
color.usage: Use for icon buttons, tags, metadata icons, and compact controls.

color.name: color.surface.control.hover
color.usage: Use for hover states on compact buttons and pills.

color.name: color.surface.control.dark
color.role: Soft control fill on dark surfaces
color.usage: Use for icon buttons, tags, metadata icons, and compact controls in dark mode.

color.name: color.surface.control.hover.dark
color.role: Soft control hover fill on dark surfaces
color.usage: Use for hover states on compact buttons and pills in dark mode.

color.name: color.text.primary
color.usage: Use for headings and strong labels on light surfaces.

color.name: color.text.primary.dark
color.usage: Use for headings and strong labels in dark mode.

color.name: color.text.secondary
color.usage: Use for metadata, helper text, inactive labels, and secondary paragraphs.

color.name: color.text.secondary.dark
color.usage: Use for metadata and helper text in dark mode.

color.name: color.focus.ring
color.usage: Use for visible focus outlines or rings in light mode.

color.name: color.focus.ring.dark
color.usage: Use for visible focus outlines or rings in dark mode.

color.name: color.border.subtle
color.usage: Use for list separators, article rules, and low-emphasis card dividers.

color.name: color.border.subtle.dark
color.usage: Use for dark mode list separators and card dividers.

color.name: color.state.error
color.usage: Use for error messages, invalid fields, and destructive confirmation.

color.name: color.state.success
color.usage: Use for success feedback and completed states.

typography.name: typography.family.sans
typography.usage: Use for all UI text, metadata, navigation, buttons, and body copy.

typography.name: typography.size.body
typography.usage: Use for regular desktop body text.

typography.name: typography.size.body.mobile
typography.usage: Use for mobile body text and compact controls.

typography.name: typography.size.h1
typography.usage: Use for primary article, panel, or page titles.

typography.name: typography.size.h2
typography.usage: Use for card titles and major section labels.

typography.name: typography.weight.bold
typography.usage: Use for navigation labels, card titles, and headings.

typography.name: typography.lineHeight.body
typography.usage: Use for long-form text and descriptive sections.

spacing.name: spacing.1
spacing.usage: Use inside icon and metadata clusters.

spacing.name: spacing.2
spacing.usage: Use inside badges, buttons, and compact rows.

spacing.name: spacing.3
spacing.usage: Use for compact cards and media padding.

spacing.name: spacing.4
spacing.usage: Use for card padding, row gaps, and widget spacing.

spacing.name: spacing.6
spacing.usage: Use between card title, metadata, and content.

spacing.name: spacing.section.md
spacing.usage: Use between major sections on desktop.

spacing.name: spacing.section.lg
spacing.usage: Use around hero and broad feature sections.

radius.name: radius.control
radius.usage: Use for icon buttons, tags, pagination, and small inputs.

radius.name: radius.action
radius.usage: Use for primary buttons and search fields.

radius.name: radius.card.default
radius.usage: Use for content cards, nav containers, widgets, and panels.

radius.name: radius.media
radius.usage: Use for avatars, thumbnails, and media blocks.

shadow.name: shadow.none
shadow.usage: Use for most cards and page sections.

shadow.name: shadow.panel.float
shadow.usage: Use only for dropdowns, menus, popovers, and overlays.

shadow.name: shadow.control.soft
shadow.usage: Use sparingly for active floating controls.

border.name: border.none
border.usage: Use for clean card containers when separation is provided by background.

border.name: border.subtle
border.usage: Use for lists, inputs, forms, and grouped content.

motion.name: motion.duration.fast
motion.usage: Use for hover, focus, and active feedback.

motion.name: motion.duration.base
motion.usage: Use for panel reveal, color transitions, and page content fades.

motion.name: motion.easing.standard
motion.usage: Use for color, panel, and transform transitions.

motion.name: motion.scale.active
motion.usage: Use for text buttons and card actions.

breakpoint.name: breakpoint.mobile
breakpoint.usage: Use as the default layout range.

breakpoint.name: breakpoint.tablet
breakpoint.usage: Use for two-column opportunities and larger type.

breakpoint.name: breakpoint.desktop
breakpoint.usage: Use for sidebars, broad cards, and full navigation.

opacity.name: opacity.disabled
opacity.usage: Use for inactive controls that remain visible.

opacity.name: opacity.muted
opacity.usage: Use for timestamps, helper text, and low-priority metadata.

blur.name: blur.panel
blur.usage: Use only when panel contrast remains sufficient.

container.name: container.page.max
container.usage: Use for top navigation and desktop content shell.

container.name: container.sidebar.width
container.usage: Use for profile, filters, summaries, or secondary widgets.

container.name: container.mobile.gutter
container.usage: Use for mobile content and floating search panels.

grid.name: grid.desktop.shell
grid.usage: Use a fixed sidebar with a flexible main column when secondary content is useful.

grid.name: grid.desktop.columns
grid.usage: Use for profile plus content, filter plus results, or navigation plus detail.

grid.name: grid.card.list
grid.usage: Use for content lists, archive summaries, and feed views.

grid.name: grid.feature.cards
grid.usage: Use for product features, benefits, plans, and testimonial cards.
